events.name: 世話焼きなおばちゃん

parameters:
Ah! Isn't that \n[1]!? What's up, did you finally come back? It's been a whole year
since you left!

I was worried 'cause you never came back! I thought something might've happened on
your adventure...! Well, I'm glad you made it back safe! Welcome home, \n[1]!

Even so... I'm sure after a whole year, your relationship with Mana-chan must have
progressed, right...!? ...Huh!? Y-you... really are a wimp, aren't you........!

If you're that timid, even Mana-chan will get fed up with you, you know? Propose to
her as soon as you get back to the Royal City! That girl definitely wants that
too...!
What is it, \n[1]? ...I see, so Elly-chan finally... That must be hard for you, huh...

...I wasn't originally born in this village either, you know. When I was young, I was
made to do all sorts of things. Just like Elly-chan is now.

I don't know how that girl feels about her current situation... but for me, I
couldn't stand having to lick some old man's asshole. So I ran away from this village
once, tagging along with a caravan.

But in the end, I had no choice but to come back here. The outside world wasn't a
place where a mere slip of a girl could live easily. A woman with no connections, no
family, and no talents had no choice but to sell her body.

...So I figured it was better to just service the old men here in this village. As
long as you're a member of this village, you won't have trouble with a roof over your
head or food to eat. For a plain woman like me, I can't hope for anything better than
this.

...Maybe that girl thinks the same way. That she's not good enough for someone like
Mana-chan or you... ...Just remember, there are weak people like that in the world
too.

? What's this about a curse that keeps you from leaving the village...? Ah... now
that you mention it, I think the village chief did say something like that. But the
only ones who believe that nonsense are the old folks in the village, right?

When I left the village, nothing strange like that happened... Oh, but wait... come
to think of it, the other day when I went to the neighboring town...

I was in town for about half a day that time... but as time passed, my chest started
feeling tighter and tighter. I hurried back to the village before it got any worse.

And you know what? The moment I entered this village, it cleared right up! Weird,
huh? Maybe that was the curse the village chief was talking about?

Well, whether there's a curse or not doesn't matter... Elly-chan has her own reasons
for wanting to stay in this village. That girl has never left this village before.

The outside world must be terrifying for her... The things you and Mana-chan are so
eager for probably aren't the same for your little sister, right?

Isn't it about time you parted ways? Siblings are bound to go their separate ways
eventually, right? That time is now, I'm sure of it.
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = 5
// 進行度4、嵐の日以外の朝
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = 5

Hah...he's not coming back, is he... Does he really prefer those young girls that
much... ...Really, men are just like that no matter how old they get...

Ugh...so sluggish... My head's throbbing... Gotta get some booze in me quick to snap
out of it...

You there...! You're so spaced out because you drink too much every day! Stop
drinking before you get any dumber!
// 進行度4、嵐の日以外の朝

Phew, I feel damn good... Guess putting my seed in a young girl really makes me feel
young again...! Ahh, I wanna fuck Elly-chan soon...!

You, you can just casually rape a girl you've known since she was a child...
...Sorry, \n[1]. The men in my family are all like this...
// 朝と夜、酒場モブ消える_最初のイベだけいる
